trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: broaden route-level test coverage for /api/evidence/:id/download with denied/missing/invalid-source audit assertions.
scope: Extend protected-evidence coverage by exercising /api/evidence/:id/download for 404/403/409 flows while asserting audit-event writes and short-circuit behavior (no provider calls when denied or non-Drive). Update the MVP catalog and run log to record the added evidence.
changes: Added MVP-014 coverage in tests/evidence-drive-file.integration.test.mjs for /api/evidence/:id/download: 404 not found, 403 scope denied, and 409 invalid source, asserting audit metadata and ensuring provider fetch is not called in short-circuit paths.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md to record the expanded /api/evidence/:id/download test evidence for MVP-014.
Updated docs/progress/run-log.md with the run summary and verification command.
known_limits: The new download tests focus on 404/403/409 short-circuit and audit behavior; follow-on work should add mentor-assigned, program-teacher scoped, and admin allow-path coverage for /api/evidence/:id/download.
End-to-end Drive download verification in Cloudflare Pages remains dependent on configuring Drive secrets and performing a real upload + download smoke check.
next_actions: Extend tests/evidence-drive-file.integration.test.mjs to cover mentor-assigned access and admin access for /api/evidence/:id/download.
Continue MVP-013 by configuring Cloudflare Pages Drive secrets and verifying real upload + download via account.html Drive panel.
